remarks: Offering a warm blend of 19th-cent character & modern updts, this 1860 Greek Revival Col showcases truly distinctive features. Despite its expansive 5,358sf, the home feels inviting & intimate, highlighted by rustic design elements incl brick hallways & accents. Orig rich random width pumpkin pine plank flrs recently refin 10' clgs thru-out & 5FPs. Set on 1.22 lvl acres w/specimen trees, this special property offers a peaceful, prvt setting in desirable Westover-just moments from city amenities. The orig residence, believed to be the orig area farmhse, feat a gracious LR & DR both w/FPs, Kit w/access to charming Bkfst Rm, Full Bth & unique brick hallway w/sunlit nooks ideal for reading, gardening & relaxing. An award-winning late 1960s addition recognized for architectural accuracy of design & craftsmnshp, enhances the home w/stunning FR feat a wall of blt-ins & spacious Den-both w/FPs & wonderful windows flooding the space w/natural light. Upstairs you'll find a priv & spacious PBR w/FP & en-suite Full Bth. 4 add'l BRs, 3rd Full Bth w/Laundry, & a framed space ready for an add'l bth, +a bright, airy Bonus Rm. Dramatic walls of floor-to-clg windows overlook the brick patio & beautifully landscaped grounds. The lvl, fenced yard w/mature plantings provides a serene outdoor retreat perfect for relaxation and entertaining. This wonderful home features brand new mech sys incl C/A, Furnace, Wtr Htr, Boiler & Well Purification sys.
